ham: Good morning! Your salary of Rs 80,000 has been credited to your account. You can view the transaction details anytime on the mobile app.
spam: Congradulation! Aapka account uspe pending K Y C update ho gaya hai. Nahi karega to 24 ghante mein block ho jayega. Click <URL> aur apna Aadhaar number dal ke confirm kare. Urgent! Har saal ka online fraud fail se bachein.
